nodes.critic_note: no_stopping beats everything — checked first, no exemption for holiday/permit/hour

nodes.condition: (day or '').strip().lower() in ('tuesday', 'friday') and hour is not None and 11 <= hour < 13 and not is_public_holiday
nodes.critic_note: active street-cleaning window beats meter/permit rules and applies to every zone; a resident permit does NOT exempt it
nodes.gray_zone: Suspended on public holidays (is_public_holiday true falls through). Window is the clock hours 11 and 12 (>=11 and <13).

nodes.condition: (zone_type or '').strip().lower() == 'metered' and (day or '').strip().lower() != 'sunday' and not is_public_holiday and hour is not None and 9 <= hour < 18
nodes.critic_note: meter enforced Mon-Sat 09:00-18:00 on non-holidays; pay, 2-hour limit
nodes.gray_zone: The 2-hour cap can't be enforced by the tree alone; a downstream system must track elapsed duration.

nodes.critic_note: metered but outside enforcement — Sunday, public holiday, or before 09:00 / from 18:00 — meter is free

nodes.condition: (zone_type or '').strip().lower() == 'residential_permit' and (day or '').strip().lower() in ('monday', 'tuesday', 'wednesday', 'thursday', 'friday') and not is_public_holiday and hour is not None and 8 <= hour < 20 and not has_resident_permit
nodes.critic_note: permit enforced Mon-Fri 08:00-20:00 on non-holidays; no permit -> not allowed
residential block open to all: permit holder during enforcement, or anyone off-hours / weekend / holiday
